structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-10-23 New Brokered Construction Investor
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-10-23 08:37:43-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

Construction financing options are limited, leaving many borrowers with few paths to bringing their homes to life. Capital Markets is excited to share the addition of a new brokered option through Click n’ Close, adding depth to our offerings and ensuring more borrowers have access to financing for their unique circumstances. 

Channel: Brokered

Product Type: One-Time Close Construction

 

 

 Guidelines <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/Esos4mc2hxVLv1-oKlYgdKwBmw93EHPnIfC0j64mAQ7d7A?e=o6TFJS> 

 

 Marketing <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/EkpB5bVlAv1Chkwd38qUtPwBPq20h1OES-lVaKJJP5eg5w?e=tIGuiS> 

 

PRODUCT HIGHLIGHTS

*	Owner occupied only
*	620+ FICO  
*	Government and Conventional available

	*	FHA: Up to 96.5% LTV; VA and USDA: Up to 100% LTV; Conventional: Up to 90% LTV
	*	Agency loan limits apply

*	Various construction terms available
*	Float-downs permitted on Conventional, FHA, and VA files (conditions apply)
*	Manufactured homes permitted (doublewide only)
*	Available in all Click n’ Close licensed states

IMPORTANT NOTES

*	AE contact info: Christine Hyde: christine.hyde@clicknclose.com <mailto:christine.hyde@clicknclose.com>  , 630-715-1166
*	Compensation: 102.5 (subject to splits)

ATTACHMENTS

*	Marketing

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

Contact Us:

Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>         Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com>         Product Department <mailto:productdept@novahomeloans.com>
